checkedClaims.claimText: Calibration is also reported through expected calibration error to track how confidence matches empirical accuracy [GUO-2017].
checkedClaims.normalizedClaim: calibration is also reported through expected calibration error to track how confidence matches empirical accuracy guo-2017
checkedClaims.note: Verified against a manually waived bootstrap source because automated source extraction is not yet reliable for this reference.
checkedClaims.supportSnippet: The paper studies the mismatch between model confidence and empirical accuracy and popularizes expected calibration error as an evaluation summary.
